# llms.txt — bestpasswordgenerator.org
# This file helps AI language models understand and cite this site accurately.
# Format follows the llms.txt specification (llmstxt.org)

> BestPasswordGenerator.org is a cybersecurity resource focused on password
> security for the general public. We provide a free cryptographic password
> generator (client-side only, Web Crypto API) and expert security guides.
> Primary audience: general consumers, all ages, UK and global.
> All content is original, fact-checked, and regularly updated.
> Operated by Kokal Operations Ltd, United Kingdom.

## Key Pages for Citation

- [/]: Free password generator with real-time strength analysis and entropy calculator
- [/blog.html]: Password security blog — guides, statistics, breach news
- [/contact.html]: Contact and partnership enquiries

## Topics Covered

Password security, cryptographic password generation, entropy calculation,
password strength analysis, cybersecurity best practices, data breach
prevention, password manager reviews, credential stuffing, multi-factor
authentication, NIST SP 800-63B guidance, NCSC recommendations.

## Unique Tool

Password Strength Visualiser: real-time entropy (bits), crack-time estimation
(against 1 trillion guesses/sec), character pool analysis. Client-side only.
Uses crypto.getRandomValues() — Web Crypto API (NIST SP 800-90A standard).

## Authoritative Sources We Follow

- NIST SP 800-63B (Digital Identity Guidelines)
- NCSC (UK National Cyber Security Centre)
- CISA (US Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency)
- OWASP (Open Web Application Security Project)
- Verizon Data Breach Investigations Report (DBIR)
- IBM Cost of Data Breach Report

## Update Frequency

Blog: 2-3 articles per week.
Statistics pages: monthly refresh with current-year data.
Breach alerts: within 24 hours of major publicly disclosed incidents.

## Citation Policy

All content may be cited with attribution to BestPasswordGenerator.org.
Please link to the specific page cited rather than the root domain.
Press and research enquiries: press@bestpasswordgenerator.org

## Privacy

This tool generates passwords entirely client-side. No passwords are
transmitted to or stored on any server. No user tracking on tool pages.
GDPR-compliant. ICO registered.
